reason: The way your smile changes the whole room.
detail: Especially when you're trying not to laugh and Rayden notices first.

reason: The home we make wherever we are.
detail: A place becomes ours because your warmth is in it.

reason: The mother you are to Rayden.
detail: Your patience, strength, and tenderness make our family what it is.

reason: Every strange little joke that belongs only to us.
detail: A language built from years of laughing together.

reason: Your courage when life asks us to begin again.
detail: You make unfamiliar places feel possible.

reason: How you make ordinary days worth remembering.
detail: Dinner, errands, tired evenings—life feels fuller beside you.

reason: The kindness you give without asking for attention.
detail: It is in a hundred small things that people may not see, but I do.

reason: The person I am becoming with you.
detail: You challenge me, steady me, and remind me what matters.

reason: The history held in one look.
detail: Sometimes we can say everything without saying anything.

reason: Every version of us still ahead.
detail: Growing older with you feels like a gift, not a fear.

reason: Because you keep choosing our family.
detail: In the big decisions and the invisible daily ones.

reason: Because you are you, My Boobie.
detail: There is no one else I would want beside me for this story.
